title: Refactor OCP-001 (OCP): Switch statement on token ID requires modification to handle new token types

detected_issue.description: Switch statement on token ID requires modification to handle new token types
detected_issue.reasoning: The _getText2 method uses a switch statement based on token IDs. Adding new token types would require modifying this switch block, violating the Open/Closed Principle.

fix_logic.summary: Replaced switch statement on JsonToken ID with if/else if structure to improve OCP adherence.
fix_logic.rationale: The original `_getText2` method used a switch statement on `JsonToken.id()`, which would require modification if new token types were introduced, violating the Open/Closed Principle. The refactored code replaces this with an `if/else if` structure that leverages `JsonToken` enum instances directly and its `isNumeric()` method. This makes the method more robust to future additions of token types, as new numeric tokens will be handled by `isNumeric()` and other non-data tokens will fall through to `t.asCharArray()`, without requiring changes to this method.
